backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, character creation/retrieval, items, and marketplace logic with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Defines old/new actor state types for data migration; the run function is a no-op pass-through since the schema is unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping planned game features (stat persistence, ability system rework, monster rebalancing, etc.) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, used as a quick reference for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Abyss Ascendant React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating authentication, profile setup, character creation with stat allocation, screen routing, dungeon flow, death handling, and loot distribution.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Full-screen modal for browsing, purchasing, equipping, and unequipping abilities with archetype filtering, ability point gating, and a 3-slot equip cap.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React form component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, choose a realm (Softcore/Hardcore), and allocate 8 stat points across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Vitality before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Displays a character's stats, derived combat values, XP progress, and equipped abilities, with controls to spend pending stat points and manage ability slots via a modal.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs a full combat simulation for a chosen dungeon mode and level, animates the combat log entry-by-entry, submits XP to the backend on victory, and calls completion or death callbacks when finished.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Screen for selecting a dungeon mode (Catacombs, Depths, or Ascension Trial) with level requirements, XP progress display, and a modal to review pending loot from the previous run.
Tabbed inventory UI showing the character's inventory, stash, and equipped items, with click-to-select item actions for equipping, unequipping, and moving items between inventory and stash.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Renders a styled tooltip card for a generated item showing its name, rarity, type, and affix bonuses with icons and colors. Also exports an `ItemCard` button component for selectable item display in lists.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Displays a mock seasonal leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, showing player rankings by level and XP with status indicators. Uses hardcoded mock data as the backend leaderboard endpoint is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets players allocate earned stat points across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Vitality when leveling up. Tracks pending allocations locally and commits them on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button. Handles edge cases like already-authenticated state by clearing and re-logging in.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: Marketplace UI with Browse and Sell tabs allowing players to view active listings, list inventory items for ICP, and buy items from other players. Integrates with backend query hooks for listings and mutations for listing/buying.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation header showing the game logo, character quick-info, and tab buttons for all major screens. Includes a logout button that clears identity and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Professions feature, displaying four crafting categories (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) with icons and descriptions in a dungeon-themed layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to set an adventurer username, with validation (length and character rules) before saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Shrines of Power feature, showing four shrine types (Ember, Gold, Arcane, Storm) with animated icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress bar toward the next level, supporting both compact (single-line) and full (multi-line with totals) display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines the Ability type and a static ABILITIES array containing combat abilities across four archetypes (melee, ranged, magic, tank), each with cooldown, damage multipliers, and stat scaling.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the MonsterTemplate interface and a MONSTER_TEMPLATES array of ten monsters (Goblin through Ancient Golem) with base stats, XP rewards, and loot weights, with attack values tuned down ~12% from originals.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the core combat simulation engine, including player stat derivation from character stats and equipped items, monster spawning with level-scaled HP/attack, and per-round combat resolution with crit rolls.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Defines item generation logic for a loot system, including affix pools, item name tables, rarity weights, and functions to randomly generate typed items (Weapon/Armor/Trinket) with stat affixes based on rarity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: Custom React hook that manages a local character's state (stats, inventory, XP, abilities, level) with localStorage persistence, providing functions for character creation, XP gain, and stat/ability management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, character, dungeon results, and marketplace operations (listings, buy, sell), each using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark fantasy design system with OKLCH CSS variables for colors, rarity tiers, glow effects, and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core frontend game types including Screen, DungeonMode, item/character/combat interfaces, class tier constants, and XP-per-level progression table.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with game-specific fonts, OKLCH-based color palettes (ember, dungeon-gold, rarity tiers, stone, obsidian), and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack ICP hack-and-slash RPG's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for build planning.
